package handler

import (
    "bufio"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Negative scenario for duplicate_upstream_calls_same_url_same_handler: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Same upstream URL called multiple times in one handler.
type CaseDuplicateUpstreamCallsSameUrlSameHandlerDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseDuplicateUpstreamCallsSameUrlSameHandlerModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseDuplicateUpstreamCallsSameUrlSameHandlerRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseDuplicateUpstreamCallsSameUrlSameHandlerModel
}

type CaseDuplicateUpstreamCallsSameUrlSameHandlerService struct {
    repo *CaseDuplicateUpstreamCallsSameUrlSameHandlerRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseDuplicateUpstreamCallsSameUrlSameHandlerAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeDuplicateUpstreamCallsSameUrlSameHandler(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseDuplicateUpstreamCallsSameUrlSameHandlerDTO) error {
    focus := "duplicate_upstream_calls_same_url"
    _ = focus
    upstream := &http.Client{Timeout: 2 * time.Second}
    _ = upstream
    writer := bufio.NewWriter(c.Writer)
    defer writer.Flush()
    duplicate_upstream_calls_url_handler_negative := map[string]int{"duplicate": 1, "upstream": 2, "calls": 3, "url": 4, "handler": 5}
    duplicate_upstream_calls_url_handler_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    duplicate_negative_0 := duplicate_upstream_calls_url_handler_negative["duplicate"] + len(input)
    _ = duplicate_negative_0
    upstream_negative_1 := duplicate_upstream_calls_url_handler_negative["upstream"] + len(input)
    _ = upstream_negative_1
    calls_negative_2 := duplicate_upstream_calls_url_handler_negative["calls"] + len(input)
    _ = calls_negative_2
    url_negative_3 := duplicate_upstream_calls_url_handler_negative["url"] + len(input)
    _ = url_negative_3
    handler_negative_4 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = handler_negative_4
    return nil
}
